hero.description: Upload a leaf image and get instant disease diagnosis, severity assessment, treatment recommendations, and prevention tips — powered by Computer Vision, Rule-Based Systems, and Probabilistic Reasoning.

aiConcepts.title: Four Pillars of CropGuard AI
aiConcepts.subtitle: CropGuard combines four distinct AI techniques to deliver a complete farm intelligence pipeline — from image capture to actionable advice.

m1.title: Computer Vision
m1.subtitle: Image Classification
m1.desc: A CNN model (MobileNetV2 fine-tuned) classifies leaf images into disease categories with real-time inference.

m2.title: Rule-Based System
m2.subtitle: Knowledge Mapping
m2.desc: Our IF-THEN rule engine encodes agricultural expert knowledge for each disease — covering causes, symptoms, and treatments.

m3.title: Probabilistic Reasoning
m3.subtitle: Weather Risk Prediction
m3.desc: Bayesian networks calculate outbreak probability based on environmental factors like humidity and temperature.

m4.title: Generative AI
m4.subtitle: Analytics Dashboard
m4.desc: GPT-4o summarizes detection history and trends into natural language reports for better farm management.

weather.title: Weather Risk Assessment
weather.subtitle: Probabilistic outbreak prediction based on environmental parameters.

workflow.title: How It Works
workflow.subtitle: Six interconnected stages transform a raw leaf photo into a complete, actionable farm advisory — powered by four AI paradigms.

s1.title: 01 Image Upload
s1.desc: Farmer uploads a leaf image via the web interface. The image is validated, resized to 224×224 px, and normalised for model input.

s2.title: 02 CNN Classification
s2.desc: MobileNetV2 (fine-tuned on PlantVillage) performs inference. The softmax layer outputs a probability distribution across 10 disease classes.

s3.title: 03 Rule-Based Advisory
s3.desc: The top predicted class triggers a lookup in the expert knowledge base. IF-THEN rules map the disease to its cause, symptoms, treatment, and urgency.

s4.title: 04 Weather Risk Score
s4.desc: Current weather parameters (temperature, humidity, rainfall) are fed into a Bayesian scoring engine that calculates outbreak probability for each disease.

s5.title: 05 Analytics & Gen AI
s5.desc: Detection data is logged to the dashboard. Recharts visualises disease trends. GPT-4o generates a natural-language farm health summary.

s6.title: 06 Farmer Advisory Output
s6.desc: A concise, farmer-friendly report is displayed: disease name, confidence, severity, root cause, step-by-step treatment, and weather-adjusted risk level.

e1.title: Data Privacy
e1.desc: No images are stored on servers. All processing happens client-side or is discarded after inference.

e2.title: Fairness
e2.desc: Training data includes crop varieties from South Asia, Africa, and South America to reduce regional bias.

e3.title: Transparency
e3.desc: Confidence scores are always displayed. The system never hides uncertainty or fabricates diagnoses.

e4.title: Human-in-Loop
e4.desc: AI recommendations are advisory only. Farmers are encouraged to verify with local agronomists.

footer.description: An AI-powered crop disease detection & farm advisory system leveraging Computer Vision, Rule-Based Systems, and Probabilistic Reasoning.
footer.copyright: © 2026 CropGuard AI — College Final Year Project
footer.tagline: Built with ❤️ for farmers using React + Framer Motion + Recharts
